title: orobanche corymbosa
intro: Orobanche corymbosa, commonly known as the corymbos leafy broomrape, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orobanche corymbosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Orobanche corymbosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for various health benefits.
